geopolitics_summary: Hormuz closure and Iran–Trump tensions driving crude/oil product rallies; EU 21st sanctions package on Russia; structural supply disruption in shipping and energy trade flows.

themes.headline: Hormuz closure sparks global energy repositioning; projects delayed.
themes.why_it_matters: Sustained Hormuz closure restricts 20%+ global crude exports; raises oil prices and redirects LNG/crude supply chains. Higher crude → higher gas burn-through and TTF upside via fuel-switching into European power.

themes.headline: Trump threatens Iran over failed negotiations; escalation risk.
themes.why_it_matters: Further Iran–US confrontation could tighten crude supply, sustain high Brent prices, and reinforce oil-to-gas switching in European power plants. Direct upside to power spreads via marginal fuel cost.

themes.headline: Europe fends off jet fuel crisis via workarounds; supply fragile.
themes.why_it_matters: Jet fuel spot tightness and temporary mitigation strategies highlight refinery utilization strain. Sustained product shortages can redirect crude away from power-station gasoil burn or compress margins; signals structural energy supply stress.

themes.headline: EU proposes freezing Russian oil price cap; 21st sanctions package.
themes.why_it_matters: Frozen price cap on Russian crude could lower global oil supply available to Europe, forcing spot purchases at higher market rates or redirecting LNG cargoes. Net effect ambiguous; downward pressure on EU power if crude costs rise and cap-compliant flows shrink.

themes.headline: EU invests €5bn in North Africa solar to power European grid.
themes.why_it_matters: Long-term African solar imports compete with European power generation on DA/Cal+1 curves. Multi-year ramp eases summer peak pricing and storage release pressure; bearish for power volatility once transmission corridors operational.

watchlist: Hormuz closure duration and impact on crude/LNG supply routing to Europe.
Iran–Trump escalation; risk of further US sanctions or military action.
EU jet fuel/distillate supply normalization timeline; refinery utilization trends.
EU 21st sanctions implementation; impact on Russian crude flows and price cap.
